2 
3 #include <ruckig/ruckig.hpp>
4 
5 #include "franky/motion/reference_type.hpp"
6 #include "franky/motion/waypoint_motion.hpp"
7 #include "franky/relative_dynamics_factor.hpp"
8 #include "franky/util.hpp"
9 
10 namespace franky {
11 
19 template <typename TargetType>
20 struct PositionWaypoint : public Waypoint<TargetType> {
21  ReferenceType reference_type{ReferenceType::kAbsolute};
22 };
23 
32 template <typename ControlSignalType, typename TargetType>
33 class PositionWaypointMotion : public WaypointMotion<ControlSignalType, PositionWaypoint<TargetType>, TargetType> {
34  public:
43  explicit PositionWaypointMotion(
44  std::vector<PositionWaypoint<TargetType>> waypoints, const RelativeDynamicsFactor &relative_dynamics_factor = 1.0,
45  bool return_when_finished = true)
46  : WaypointMotion<ControlSignalType, PositionWaypoint<TargetType>, TargetType>(waypoints, return_when_finished),
47  relative_dynamics_factor_(relative_dynamics_factor) {}
48 
49  [[nodiscard]] const RelativeDynamicsFactor &relative_dynamics_factor() const { return relative_dynamics_factor_; }
50 
51  protected:
52  void setInputLimits(
53  const PositionWaypoint<TargetType> &waypoint, ruckig::InputParameter<7> &input_parameter) const override {
54  auto [vel_lim, acc_lim, jerk_lim] = getAbsoluteInputLimits();
55 
56  auto relative_dynamics_factor =
57  waypoint.relative_dynamics_factor * relative_dynamics_factor_ * this->robot()->relative_dynamics_factor_rt();
58 
59  input_parameter.max_velocity = toStdD<7>(relative_dynamics_factor.velocity() * vel_lim);
60  input_parameter.max_acceleration = toStdD<7>(relative_dynamics_factor.acceleration() * acc_lim);
61  input_parameter.max_jerk = toStdD<7>(relative_dynamics_factor.jerk() * jerk_lim);
62 
63  if (relative_dynamics_factor.max_dynamics()) {
64  input_parameter.synchronization = ruckig::Synchronization::TimeIfNecessary;
65  } else {
66  input_parameter.synchronization = ruckig::Synchronization::Time;
67  if (waypoint.minimum_time.has_value()) input_parameter.minimum_duration = waypoint.minimum_time.value().toSec();
68  }
69  }
70 
71  void extrapolateMotion(
72  const RobotState &robot_state, const franka::Duration &time_step,
73  const ruckig::InputParameter<7> &input_parameter, ruckig::OutputParameter<7> &output_parameter) const override {
74  auto [vel_lim, acc_lim, jerk_lim] = getAbsoluteInputLimits();
75 
76  // We use the desired state here as this is likely what the robot uses
77  // internally as well
78  auto [pos_d, vel_d, acc_d] = getDesiredState(robot_state);
79 
80  auto vel = toEigenD<7>(input_parameter.current_velocity);
81  auto pos = toEigenD<7>(input_parameter.current_position);
82 
83  auto vel_delta = acc_d * time_step.toSec();
84  auto new_vel_d = (vel_d + vel_delta).cwiseMin(vel_lim).cwiseMax(-vel_lim);
85  auto new_pos = pos + (vel_d + new_vel_d) * time_step.toSec() / 2.0;
86  auto new_vel = (vel + vel_delta).cwiseMin(vel_lim).cwiseMax(-vel_lim);
87 
88  // Franka assumes a constant acceleration model if no new input is received.
89  // See https://frankaemika.github.io/docs/libfranka.html#under-the-hood
90  output_parameter.new_acceleration = input_parameter.current_acceleration;
91  output_parameter.new_velocity = toStdD<7>(new_vel);
92  output_parameter.new_position = toStdD<7>(new_pos);
93  }
94 
95  [[nodiscard]] std::tuple<Vector7d, Vector7d, Vector7d> getAbsoluteInputLimits() const override = 0;
96 
97  [[nodiscard]] virtual std::tuple<Vector7d, Vector7d, Vector7d> getDesiredState(
98  const RobotState &robot_state) const = 0;
99 
100  private:
101  RelativeDynamicsFactor relative_dynamics_factor_;
102 };
103 
104 } // namespace franky
